zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Pipard於大約1323年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Pipard, Knight24歲，母親Margery de Bloyou14歲。她於大約1345年與Robert De Fitz Elis結婚。她去世於1375年8月3日在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Pipard于大约1323年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Pipard, Knight24岁，母亲Margery de Bloyou14岁。她于大约1345年与Robert De Fitz Elis结婚。她去世于1375年8月3日在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pipard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Normand, Emile, Antoine, Cecile, Jean-Paul, Renald, Adrien, Aime, Andre, Aurel.
nickname from Old French pinard, a small medieval coin, so named from pin ‘pine’ because it bore the device of a pine cone.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Pipard was born about 1323, in England, her father, Sir William Pipard, Knight, was 24 and her mother, Margery de Bloyou, was 14. She married Robert De Fitz Elis about 1345. She died on 3 August 1375, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Pipard est née environ 1323, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Pipard, Knight, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margery de Bloyou, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Robert De Fitz Elis environ 1345. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1375, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Pipard um 1323 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Pipard, Knight 24 und ihre Mutter Margery de Bloyou 14. Sie hat um 1345 Robert De Fitz Elis geheiratet. Sie starb am 3. August 1375 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pipard è nata il circa 1323 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Pipard, Knight, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margery de Bloyou, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Robert De Fitz Elis circa 1345. Morì il 3 agosto 1375, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pipardが約1323年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Pipard, Knightは24歳，母Margery de Bloyouは14歳であった。約1345年にRobert De Fitz Elisと結婚した。彼女は1375年8月3日にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pipard(이)가 대략 1323년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Pipard, Knight(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Bloyou(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1345년 Robert De Fitz Elis(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1375년 8월 3일 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pipard nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Pipard, Knight, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Bloyou, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert De Fitz Elis aproximadamente 1345. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1375, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Pipard родилась около 1323 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Pipard, Knight было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Bloyou, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert De Fitz Elis около 1345 г. Она умерла 3 августа 1375 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Pipard nació aproximadamente 1323, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Pipard, Knight, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margery de Bloyou, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Robert De Fitz Elis aproximadamente 1345. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1375, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
